description: Power BI report bound to a semantic model. Supports PBIR and PBIR-Legacy formats

definition_parts.description: REQUIRED. Semantic model binding (pbiModelDatabaseName = semantic model UUID)
PBIR-Legacy: all pages and visuals in one file
PBIR: version metadata (version must be semver like '4.0.0')

flags.--dataset: Semantic model ID to bind (auto-generates definition.pbir + blank report.json)

notes: --dataset is the simplest path: auto-generates both definition files
definition.pbir is ALWAYS required for update-definition (even if only updating visuals)
PBIR-Legacy with prototypeQuery is REQUIRED for visuals that render data
PBIR format visuals store correctly but do NOT render data programmatically
